---
title: "ADS503 Final Project"
author: "Stephanie Smith, James Shoenhair, Ramin Fazli, Veronica Burke"
date: "2026-06-05"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Load Data & Gather Preliminary Information

```{r}
# Load Census Income Data
data <- read_csv("Users/vrb/Downloads/census+income/adult.data")
test_data <- read_csv("Users/vrb/Downloads/census+income/adult.test")
head(data)
